creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Section 5.7.8. of Porter's Handbook states that you can use minimal version of dependency in any *_DEPENDS variable, which is not true for LIB_DEPENDS. It works only for RUN_ and BUILD_DEPENDS.

Fix: 

change:
> can be specified in any *_DEPENDS variable

to:
> can be specified in BUILD_DEPENDS and RUN_DEPENDS variables
